project.name: LibMgnt
project.status: Runtime Configuration Complete + Maintenance Mode + Dynamic Settings Integration

database_schema.summary: PostgreSQL: Users, Categories, Books, BorrowRecords, BorrowItems, Notifications, AuditLogs, SystemSettings, NotificationSettings. Settings la key-value store dung JSON.
new_tables_this_session: system_settings (key: PK, value: JSON, category: String, description: String?, updatedAt)
notification_settings (type: PK, roles: JSON, isEnabled: Boolean, updatedAt)
database_schema.relationships_explained: 1 User co nhieu Notification, BorrowRecord, AuditLog. SystemSettings la global config (key-value). NotificationSettings dinh tuyen thong bao theo role.

api_endpoints.explained: Login: Kiem tra email/password + MAINTENANCE_MODE check (chan non-admin khi bao tri)
GET: Lay tat ca cau hinh. PATCH /:key: Cap nhat mot cau hinh (Admin only, co Audit Log)
GET: Lay routing thong bao. PATCH /:type: Cap nhat roles + isEnabled cho loai thong bao
GET: Public endpoint (khong can auth) - tra ve { maintenance: true/false } de FE hien warning
GET: Fetch notifications for current user. POST: Send notification. PATCH: Mark as read.
Process book returns, calculate fines (dynamic from settings), trigger notifications.

business_rules: Always HTTP 200 Strategy: Backend LUON tra HTTP 200, success/error nam trong response body { code, data/error }
Dynamic Settings: Moi business rule (borrow limit, fine, duration) lay tu SystemSettings DB, fallback ve DEFAULT_SETTINGS
Effective Borrow Limit: User Specific > System Settings > Hardcoded Default (5)
Maintenance Mode: Chan tat ca request (ke ca login) cho non-admin, Admin van truy cap binh thuong
Maintenance Login Flow: Middleware cho login qua -> AuthService check role -> Block non-admin
Notification Routing: Moi loai thong bao co the bat/tat va chi dinh roles nhan
Overdue Checker: Chay hang gio, chi thuc hien tai gio cau hinh (OVERDUE_CHECK_TIME)
Due Soon Alert: Quet sach sap den han theo DUE_SOON_DAYS tu settings
Fine Calculation: fineAmount = overdueDays * FINE_PER_DAY (dynamic), cap boi MAX_FINE
Audit Logging: Moi thay doi settings duoc ghi nhan voi SYSTEM_CONFIG_UPDATED / NOTIFICATION_CONFIG_UPDATED
features: System Settings Module: Admin UI de quan ly cau hinh he thong (Borrow, Fine, Notification, System)
Maintenance Mode: Trang /maintenance voi glassmorphism UI + warning banner tren Login page
Event-Driven Notification System: Real-time bell alerts with metadata-driven dynamic rendering
Dynamic Notification Routing: Bat/tat + phan quyen roles cho tung loai thong bao
Automated Overdue Engine: Dynamic scheduling tu settings, due-soon alerts
Librarian Command Center: Actionable Bento Grid dashboard
Borrow Management: POS-style workflow with dynamic duration from settings

patterns: Metadata-driven UI Pattern: Backend sends data, Frontend renders message (Event-driven)
Settings Service Pattern: Centralized settingService voi cache, fallback, Zod validation
Maintenance Guard Pattern: Middleware + AuthService phoi hop, Axios interceptor redirect FE
Always 200 Pattern: Error middleware convert moi loi sang HTTP 200 + error body
Proxy-based Alias Strategy: Internal src/shared/ re-exports root shared/ to satisfy Vite
gotchas: Prisma JSON fields: Use explicit casting 'as any' in repositories to satisfy TypeScript
Vite ESM Interface Export: Khong import interface truc tiep tu @qltv/shared, dung type local hoac 'import type'
Shared Package Build: Phai chay 'pnpm build' trong packages/shared sau moi thay doi truoc khi FE thay duoc
Monorepo tsconfig rootDir: Phai tro ve root monorepo de resolve cross-package imports
Maintenance Middleware + Login: Phai cho /auth/login di qua middleware, check role trong AuthService (vi chua co token khi login)
FE Service import: Dung @/services/api (ten 'api') chu khong phai @/lib/axios (khong ton tai)
FE ApiResponse type: Import tu @/types/response.type (local) chu khong phai @qltv/shared (Vite ESM crash)
conventions: English Localization for all UI and code comments (plain text only, no emoji in code)
JSONB for flexible metadata in Notification, AuditLog, SystemSettings
SettingKey enum + DEFAULT_SETTINGS defined in packages/shared/src/constants/settings.ts
ErrorCode defined in packages/shared, mirrored in apps/web/src/types/api.enum.ts for FE
